title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-10
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, checking on all the community apps in the greenhouse to make sure everything is blooming.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot acting as gardeners in a digital greenhouse, watering code-plants that have little data charts on them, representing the automated metrics update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The plants have tiny pixelated bar charts on their leaves. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
